Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SubscriberPackageVersion

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SubscriberPackageVersion
public class SubscriberPackageVersion extends SObject

Java class for SubscriberPackageVersion complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SubscriberPackageVersion">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppExchangeDescription" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppExchangeLogoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppExchangePackageName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppExchangePublisherName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BuildNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CspTrustedSites" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SubscriberPackageCspTrustedSites" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Dependencies" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SubscriberPackageDependencies" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InstallValidationStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsBeta" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeprecated" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsManaged" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOrgDependent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPasswordProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSecurityReviewed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MajorVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MinorVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Package2ContainerOptions" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PatchVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PostInstallUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Profiles" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SubscriberPackageProfiles" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PublisherName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReleaseNotesUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReleaseState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RemoteSiteSettings" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}SubscriberPackageRemoteSiteSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SubscriberPackageId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
